div.p: Your trusted partner in international trade and logistics

Established as an integrated entity providing commercial brokerage and supply chain services from China to the Middle East and North Africa. We address the market's need for a trusted partner representing commercial interests in China with professionalism.
To enable clients (individuals, companies, and industrial facilities) to achieve their business goals through flexible, reliable import solutions that reduce risks and minimize logistics costs.
To be the preferred partner for regional companies in facilitating trade and goods flow with Chinese markets through professional, transparent, and sustainable business relationships.
Complete clarity on costs, commissions, and real-time shipment status without hidden fees
Rigorous field inspections and product testing before shipment to ensure compliance
Solutions tailored to serve large manufacturers, SMEs, and individual importers equally
Thorough contract and customs document review ensuring regulatory compliance
Comprehensive solutions designed to meet diverse import needs
We support industrial and manufacturing facilities with integrated services to secure machinery and heavy equipment that meet technical requirements.
Identify leading Chinese manufacturers and provide detailed technical comparisons
Coordinate with your engineers to ensure equipment meets precise requirements
Conduct pre-shipment testing to verify mechanical and software functionality
Facilitate ongoing sourcing of spare parts and raw materials for production continuity
We provide comprehensive solutions for real estate developers, contractors, and project managers to equip and finish buildings of all sizes.
Natural marble, ceramics, porcelain, plumbing fixtures, windows, and doors
Modern lighting solutions, kitchens, office furniture, and hotel fixtures
Ensure all materials meet local building codes and safety certifications
Schedule material shipments to align with project construction phases
We support traders, distributors, and companies in growing their business through streamlined commercial import processes.
Connect directly with Chinese factories to access competitive prices
Coordinate with manufacturers for custom branding and packaging
Track manufacturing phases to ensure on-time delivery schedules
Verify quality certificates and customs documentation requirements
Designed specifically for SMEs, e-commerce startups, and individuals who don't require full container shipments.
Combine purchases from multiple suppliers into one shared container
Pay only for your shipment volume, not the entire container
Verify packaging quality and re-wrap items to prevent damage
Help startups understand real import costs and feasibility
To ensure your shipment arrives safely, we manage essential logistics aspects for peace of mind.
Random or complete lot inspection before loading for specification compliance
Coordinate with major shipping lines for competitive rates
Review all documents and certificates to ensure smooth port clearance
Real-time monitoring from factory to final delivery destination
Discuss your specific needs with our team
Systematic, transparent procedures to minimize risk and ensure excellence
Review technical specifications, quantities, budget, and required certifications
Connect with suitable manufacturers and present available options with detailed comparison
Ship sample units for your review and approval before bulk production
Review and finalize commercial contracts to protect your interests
Transfer deposit to manufacturer to commence production
Maintain regular contact with production management for progress updates
Receive brief progress reports on manufacturing stages
Our field inspectors visit the factory to conduct comprehensive quality checks
Sample inspection based on AQL standards or your specific requirements
Detailed inspection report with photos and video evidence before final payment
Arrange ocean or air freight based on timeline and budget
Prepare all required certificates and customs documents
Track shipment until arrival at your destination
Before any agreement, we verify:

ul.li: Valid government licenses and export permits

div.p: At 80%+ production completion:

ul.li: Random sample testing per AQL standards

div.p: During container loading, we verify:

ul.li: Official sealing with recorded seal numbers

div.p: We understand that quality is your capital. We don't rely solely on factory promises—instead, we implement rigorous practical standards to verify and certify. We maintain absolute transparency, reporting the real status of your goods as they are on the ground, empowering you to make informed business decisions based on reliable reports.
Tell us your requirements, and we'll provide an accurate quote within 48-72 hours

input.name: product_name
input.placeholder: e.g., CNC Drilling Machine, Ceramic Tiles 60x60cm, etc.

textarea.name: specifications
textarea.placeholder: Provide as much detail as possible...

div.label: Upload Images, Drawings, or Files (Optional)
div.small: Accepted: PDF, JPG, PNG, CAD files

div.label: Quantity Needed (units, kg, or cubic meters) *
Do you want custom branding or packaging (OEM/ODM)? *
Full Container (FCL) - Best for large quantities
Partial Shipping (LCL) - Cost-effective for smaller orders
Air Freight - Fast delivery
Unsure, advise me
Do you need customs clearance assistance? *
Yes, handle everything for me
No, I'll handle it with my broker
Do you have valid import license/business registration? *
I agree to the privacy policy and allow contact within 48-72 hours *

div.p: We'll review your request and contact you with a quote and next steps
Expert insights to help you master international trade

article.h3: Is Importing from China Still Profitable? A Realistic Analysis
article.p: Explore how imports have transformed from "random importing" to "smart, organized importing" focused on private labels and custom solutions that enhance competitiveness.

article.h3: Your Complete Guide to Canton Fair (Guangzhou)
article.p: Canton Fair is the world's largest trade gathering for sourcing manufacturers. Learn tips for planning your visit, understanding each pavilion, and negotiating professionally with exhibitors.

article.h3: Avoid Customs Detention: Essential Documents and Certificates
article.p: Shipments often face delays due to missing documents. Learn which commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and compliance certifications are required for smooth clearance.

article.h3: Security Protocol: Ensuring Product Compliance Before Shipment
article.p: Why you shouldn't rely solely on internet photos or factory promises. Discover pre-shipment inspection protocols using AQL sampling standards and proper loading supervision practices.

div.p: Subscribe to our newsletter for updates on shipping rates, holiday seasons in China affecting production, and changes to customs regulations.
If you have specific questions about your current shipment, our team is ready to help
